sizing_rule.note: When tangent portfolio allocation P exceeds 1.0 (unconstrained), introduce NIC (non-interest-bearing cash) as additional market system to find optimal portfolio. Derived from Vince optimal-f framework applied to multi-market allocation.

source_rule_text: Allow the tangent portfolio allocation percentage to exceed 1 by introducing a non-interest-bearing cash (NIC) market system to find the unconstrained optimal portfolio.
